title: Mideast Live Updates: Deadly Attacks in Lebanon and Delay in Talks Test U.S.-Iran Deal
summary_full: Israel said it targeted Hezbollah militants after four of its soldiers were killed in southern Lebanon. Switzerland postponed U.S.-Iran talks that had been set for Friday.
summary_public: Israel said it targeted Hezbollah militants after four of its soldiers were killed in southern Lebanon. Switzerland postponed U.S.-Iran talks that had been set for Friday.
